summary: Tested Investor Portal overhaul features. All backend APIs pass (15/15 tests). Frontend UI working correctly with sidebar showing only Overview, Development Slate, Investment Model, Expression of Interest. Document request chips and forms working. Expression of Interest with project dropdown working. AI Cover Image URL fix verified.
critical_code_review_comments: AI Cover Image fix correctly changes URL from /uploads/ to /api/upload/images/
Investor Portal sidebar correctly shows only 4 sections (Track Record and Documents removed)
Document requests endpoint properly stores project_id, project_title, doc_type, and user details
Expression of Interest form correctly shows project dropdown when 'Single Project' is selected
All data-testid attributes present for testing
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed document requests and inquiries for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Investor Portal overhaul complete. All features working: sidebar navigation (4 sections), Development Slate with project cards, project modal with Request Materials chips (Pitch Deck, Screener, Script), document request form with user details, Expression of Interest with conditional project dropdown.

details: Sidebar shows only: Overview, Development Slate, Investment Model, Expression of Interest
Track Record section removed
Documents section removed (now inside project modals)
Project cards display with poster, title, genre, status, hook
'View Details & Request Materials' link visible on cards
Clicking card opens project detail modal
Modal shows project details (title, genre, status, hook, description, budget range)
Request Materials section with 3 chips: Request Pitch Deck, Request Screener, Request Script
Clicking chip shows form with Name, Email, Company, Phone fields
Form submission creates entry in database and shows success toast
Form has Name, Email, Investor Type, Area of Interest, Message fields
Selecting 'Single Project' shows project dropdown
Project dropdown populated with available projects
Form submission works correctly with project selection
AI route returns /api/upload/images/{filename} instead of /uploads/{filename}
Image serving endpoint /api/upload/images/{filename} working correctly
Images accessible via the correct URL path
POST /api/investors/document-requests creates request with all fields
Request includes project_id, project_title, doc_type, name, email, company, phone
Status defaults to 'pending'
Admin endpoint GET /api/investors/admin/document-requests returns all requests
POST /api/investors/inquiries creates inquiry with project selection
selected_project_id and selected_project_title stored correctly
All investor types supported: Individual, Family Office, Venture Capital, Strategic Partner, Other
All interest areas supported: Single Project, Slate Investment, Strategic Partnership, Advisory Role
